# Capta

> Capta is an AI receptionist named Maria that answers every business call 24/7 in English and Spanish. Built specifically for home service contractors — plumbers, HVAC techs, electricians, landscapers, roofers, painters, and general contractors. Unlimited calls, native bilingual included. 30-day money-back guarantee.

## Product Overview

- [How It Works](https://captahq.com/platform): Maria answers calls in under 2 seconds, books appointments, sends SMS confirmations, detects emergencies, and builds your CRM automatically.
- [Pricing](https://captahq.com/pricing): $497/mo (monthly) or $397/mo (annual at $4,764/yr). Unlimited calls. No per-call fees. No setup fees.
- [Platform](https://captahq.com/platform): Full dashboard with call analytics, CRM, appointment management, SMS, estimates, referral program, and weekly digest emails.
- [About](https://captahq.com/about): Founded by Ulysses Munoz in San Antonio, TX. Built by a contractor's son who watched his dad miss calls on job sites.

## Who It's For

Capta is built exclusively for home service contractors:
- Plumbers
- HVAC technicians
- Electricians
- Landscapers
- Roofers
- Painters
- General contractors
- Pest control companies
- Any trade business that misses calls while on job sites

## Content Library

Capta publishes bilingual blog content covering AI receptionist technology, trade-specific use cases, competitor comparisons, and data-driven insights for home service businesses.

- [Blog (English)](https://captahq.com/blog)
- [Blog (Español)](https://captahq.com/es/blog)
- [RSS Feed (English)](https://captahq.com/blog/feed.xml)
- [RSS Feed (Español)](https://captahq.com/es/blog/feed.xml)

Topics include:
- AI receptionist comparisons (vs Smith.ai, Ruby, Goodcall, Rosie, Nexa, Dialzara, Jobber)
- Trade-specific guides (plumbing, HVAC, electrical, landscaping, roofing)
- Missed call revenue impact and data analysis
- Bilingual customer service for contractors
- Home service business growth strategies

## Key Comparisons

- [Capta vs Smith.ai](https://captahq.com/blog/capta-vs-smith-ai): Unlimited flat-rate vs per-call pricing. Native bilingual included vs add-on cost.
- [Capta vs Ruby Receptionists](https://captahq.com/blog/capta-vs-ruby-receptionists): AI at $497/mo flat vs human at $245-$1,640/mo per-minute billing.
- [Capta vs Goodcall](https://captahq.com/blog/capta-vs-goodcall): Unlimited customers vs 100-customer cap. Built-in CRM vs none.
- [Capta vs Rosie AI](https://captahq.com/blog/capta-vs-rosie-ai): Trade-specific AI vs generic. Emergency detection vs basic routing.
- [Capta vs Nexa](https://captahq.com/blog/capta-vs-nexa): Predictable pricing vs variable per-minute billing.
- [Capta vs Dialzara](https://captahq.com/blog/capta-vs-dialzara): Native bilingual vs single-language. CRM included vs integrations required.
- [Capta vs Jobber AI](https://captahq.com/blog/capta-vs-jobber-ai-receptionist): Standalone AI receptionist vs add-on feature.

## Trade-Specific Use Cases

- [AI Receptionist for Plumbers](https://captahq.com/blog/ai-receptionist-for-plumbing): Emergency leak calls at 2 AM, Maria answers and dispatches.
- [AI Receptionist for HVAC](https://captahq.com/blog/ai-receptionist-for-hvac): Summer AC emergencies, after-hours booking, seasonal surge handling.
- [AI Receptionist for Electricians](https://captahq.com/blog/ai-receptionist-for-electricians): Panel upgrades, safety calls, bilingual customer base.
- [AI Receptionist for Landscapers](https://captahq.com/blog/ai-receptionist-for-landscaping): Seasonal booking surges, crew scheduling, estimate requests.
- [AI Receptionist for Roofers](https://captahq.com/blog/ai-receptionist-for-roofers): Storm-season lead capture, insurance claim calls.

## Free Tools

- [Missed Call Audit](https://captahq.com/audit): Free analysis showing how many calls your business misses and how much revenue you're leaving on the table.

## Help & Documentation

- [Help Center](https://captahq.com/help): Guides for setup, call forwarding, dashboard features, billing, and troubleshooting.
- [FAQ](https://captahq.com/faq): Answers to common questions about pricing, setup, bilingual support, and features.

## Integrations

- Google Calendar (two-way sync for appointments)
- Stripe (billing and checkout)
- Twilio (SMS confirmations and call routing)
- Webhooks (connect to any system)
